summary: The PR is one coherent Human Decision Checkpoint review unit; splitting would create unsafe intermediate states.
inspection_summary: Inspected current HEAD, complete diff, Story/Architecture/Spec alignment, persistence, orchestration, CLI, design registration, and regression coverage; focused tests pass 72/72.
judgment_delta: Initial size concern changed to one-unit approval because artifact-before-wait, answer-before-resume, cursor-before-action, and current-HEAD checkpoint-before-clear form one indivisible safety contract.
